title: File selection loads diff
description: Clicking a file in the file tree should load that file's diff lines into the diff view. Currently only the first file is loaded on startup.

title: Help popup too small, bottom cut off
description: Help overlay popup sized too small. Bottom content clipped/not visible. Need increase popup height or make scrollable.

title: Implement configurable line wrap width (default 100)
description: Currently line_wrap is a bool in Config. Change it to an integer representing the wrap column width (default 100, 0 = no wrap). Update the UI and config serialization accordingly. The config file already exists at ~/.config/lado/config.toml.

title: 'v' to mark viewed should auto-advance to next file
description: When pressing 'v' to toggle a file as viewed, if the file is being set to viewed (not unviewed), it should automatically advance to the next file — equivalent to pressing 'v' then 'J'.

title: Make viewed checkbox clickable in file tree
description: The viewed checkbox that appears left of filenames in the file tree should be clickable to toggle the viewed state, not just decorative.

title: Vertically center viewed checkbox in diff view header
description: The viewed checkbox in the top-right of the diff view header bar currently touches the top of the line. It should be vertically centered within the header bar.

title: PR diff: compare against actual base commit, warn if not up-to-date
description: When viewing a PR, we should compare against the specific commit of the base branch (usually main) that the PR points to, not HEAD of main. If the PR branch is not up-to-date with the base, show a note/indicator to the user.

title: Add button to resolve/unresolve PR review comments
description: Add a resolve button on comment threads in the diff view. Requires GraphQL mutation to toggle thread resolution state on GitHub. Depends on the GraphQL comment fetching migration to have isResolved data available.

title: Fetch PR comments via GraphQL for resolved/unresolved status
description:
Switch get_pr_comments from REST API (pulls/{id}/comments) to GitHub GraphQL API (pullRequest.reviewThreads) to get isResolved field. This enables distinguishing resolved vs unresolved comments in the UI.

Requirements:
- Fetch isResolved per review thread
- Filter out resolved comments from FileComments so they don't appear in diff view or comment count badge
- Only unresolved comments should contribute to the comment_count shown in the file tree sidebar

Requires restructuring PrComment to include thread-level resolution state.

title: Show comment indicator on files in sidebar
description: Files that have an active comment should display a visual indicator (e.g. badge or icon) next to their name in the left-side file browser panel. This helps users quickly identify which files have ongoing discussions.
close_reason: Implemented with accurate counting - only comments matching actual diff lines are counted

title: Make diff text selectable
description: Text in the diff view should be selectable so users can copy code snippets. Currently text is non-selectable in the Slint UI.

title: Compact deeply nested directory paths in file tree
description:
When directories are heavily nested (common in Java projects like src/main/java/com/example/service/impl/), the file tree becomes hard to read and wastes horizontal space.

Replace the inner segments of long directory paths with /.../ to keep the tree compact while preserving the meaningful start and end of the path.

Example:
- Before: src/main/java/com/example/service/impl/UserService.java
- After:  src/.../impl/UserService.java

Acceptance criteria:
- Directories with depth beyond a threshold get their inner segments collapsed to /.../
- The first and last segments should remain visible for context
- Collapsed paths should still be navigable (expand on click or hover to show full path)
close_reason: Compact tree feature already implemented in recent commits

title: J/K file navigation should skip directories
description:
Currently J/K (file next/prev) steps through all entries in the file tree including directories. Since directories can't display a diff, J/K should skip over them and only navigate between actual files.

Current behavior: J moves focus to next entry (file or folder)
Expected behavior: J moves focus to next file, skipping any folders in between

Implementation:
- Update key handler in main.slint to find next/prev non-folder entry
- May need a loop or helper to skip over is-folder entries

title: Diff viewer does not use full available height
description:
The diff viewer panel does not extend to the full available height of the window. It stops at the same height as the file viewer side panel, leaving unused space below.

Expected: Diff viewer should extend to the bottom of the window, using all available vertical space.

Actual: Diff viewer height is constrained to match the file viewer panel height.

This is a layout/sizing issue in the Slint UI components.

title: Collapsible directories in file viewer
description:
Add ability to collapse/expand directories in the file tree panel. Currently directories are shown flat or always expanded. Users should be able to click on directory entries to collapse/expand them, similar to how file explorers work.

Implementation notes:
- Use Slint skill for UI work
- Directory nodes should have expand/collapse indicators (chevrons or +/-)
- Collapsed state should hide child entries
- Consider persisting collapse state during session

title: Sync focused-index when file is selected with mouse
description: When selecting a file by clicking with the mouse, the focused-index is not updated. This means if the user clicks file #5 then presses J/K, keyboard navigation starts from wherever focused-index was last set (e.g. file #0) instead of from the clicked file (#5). The focused-index should be updated to match the clicked file's index.

title: Highlight selected file in side panel
description: When a file is selected in the file tree/list, visually highlight it to show which file is currently being viewed in the diff panel. This improves UX by making it clear which file the user is looking at.

title: Diff viewer should extend to window bottom
description: The diff viewer's bottom edge aligns with the file tree panel or has a fixed height. It should stretch all the way down to the window's bottom edge for better use of screen space.

title: J/K navigation should directly load files without Enter
description: Currently when using J/K keys to navigate through the file list, the user has to press Enter to load and display the diff for the selected file. The navigation should directly load the file when moving to it with J/K, providing a more fluid browsing experience similar to vim-style navigation in other diff tools.

title: Theme not loading from config on startup
description: When config.toml has ui_theme set to 'solarized-light', the application still starts with the default dark theme instead of applying the saved theme preference.

title: Persist theme settings in config file
description: Read and write UI theme preference to a config file (e.g., ~/.config/lado/config.toml) so it persists between sessions. Currently theme resets to dark on every launch.

title: Switch between PR commits
description: Allow navigating between commits in a PR. Comments are tied to specific commits - show which commit a comment references and let user view that commit's diff.

title: Show PR comments from GitHub
description: Fetch and display PR review comments inline with diff using gh CLI. Show comment author, timestamp, and thread context.

title: Add README
description: Create README.md with installation instructions, screenshots, usage examples, and feature list.

title: Hierarchical file tree
description: Use build_file_tree() and flatten_tree() from git/file_tree.rs to display files in folder hierarchy instead of flat list.

title: Display hunk headers in diff view
description: Show @@ -X,Y +X,Y @@ separator lines between diff hunks. The DiffHunk.header field is already parsed but not rendered.

title: Improve solarized light theme to match Emacs solarized
description: Make the solarized light theme (and possibly dark theme too) similar to the user's Emacs solarized themes. This involves reviewing the current theme implementation and adjusting colors to match the Emacs solarized color palette more closely.

title: Hide 'All Changes' when PR has only one commit
description:
When viewing a PR with only one commit, the "All Changes" option in the commit list is redundant - it shows the exact same diff as the single commit.

Expected behavior:
- If commits.length == 1, don't show "All Changes" header
- Just show the single commit entry directly
- Or hide the commit list entirely since there's nothing to navigate

Implementation in commit_list.slint - conditionally show the "All Changes" row based on commits count.

title: Remove syntax theme setting from UI
description:
The syntax theme setting in Code Appearance is useless - it gets overwritten based on the UI theme selection anyway (see app.rs lines 64-70 and 260-266 where syntax theme is derived from UI theme).

Remove:
- syntax_theme field from AppSettings struct in settings_panel.slint
- Syntax theme dropdown from settings panel UI
- syntax_theme from Config struct and config.rs
- Related mapping logic in app.rs (keep the auto-derivation from UI theme)

title: Keyboard shortcuts for file tree expand/collapse
description:
Add keyboard shortcuts to control file tree expansion:

- Expand all directories
- Collapse all directories  
- Expand/collapse currently focused directory
- Expand current directory and children (recursive)

Consider shortcuts like:
- `e` or `x` to toggle expand/collapse on focused folder
- `E` or `X` to expand/collapse all
- `Ctrl+Right` to expand, `Ctrl+Left` to collapse (common in file explorers)

Implementation notes:
- Add callbacks to MainWindow for expand-all, collapse-all, toggle-focused
- Wire keyboard handler in main.slint FocusScope
- Update expanded_state HashMap in App accordingly

title: Update all crates to latest versions
description: Update all dependencies in Cargo.toml to their latest versions. Note: slint is already at 1.14.

title: Support color themes
description: Add theme switching (solarized-light, solarized-dark, monokai, etc). Theme config in ui/theme.slint needs to be dynamic.

title: Show PR title in toolbar
description: When viewing a PR, display PrInfo.title in the toolbar instead of just PR #N.

title: Keyboard navigation
description: Arrow keys to navigate file list, u/s to toggle unified/side-by-side view, Enter to select file.

title: Integrate syntax highlighting
description: Connect SyntaxHighlighter from highlighting/syntax.rs to diff view. Color code content based on file extension.
